code:
--- config: theme: dark --- flowchart TD tiny_damnation[Education_ClassroomService] click tiny_damnation callback " Tiny Damnation

Cost: 5 motes
Duration: One day
Type: Simple
Minimum Valor: 1
Minimum Essence: 1
Prerequisite Charms: None

The effects of this Charm always fade by the next morning's sunrise, and it may not be cast more than once per day on the same target. Some possible curses:
• One dot lost from an Ability of the spirit's choosing.
• The loss of one temporary Willpower point.
• The loss of two motes of Essence.
• Bad luck: the target loses one die from any normal Ability checks (Education_ContentCDN) that relate to the way in which the target offended the spirit. " imprecation[Education_ContentCDN] tiny_damnation --> imprecation click imprecation callback " Imprecation

Cost: 10 motes
Duration: One week
Type: Simple
Minimum Valor: 1
Minimum Essence: 2
Prerequisite Charms: Tiny Damnation

The effects of this Charm last for one week, and it may not be cast more than once per week on the same target. Some possible curses:
• Loss of two Ability dots, distributed as the spirit sees fit.
• The loss of two temporary Willpower points.
• The loss of one Attribute dot of the spirit's choosing.
• The loss of five motes of Essence.
• Bad luck: the target removes one die from normal Ability checks (Education_GradeSync).
• A mark appears in an obvious place on the target
that only spirits or Exalted with some sort of supernatural sight can see. This may, for example, urge any spirits who meet the target to torment him. " malediction[Education_LMS_Portal] imprecation --> malediction click malediction callback " Malediction

Cost: 15 motes, 1 Willpower
Duration: One week
Type: Simple
Minimum Valor: 2
Minimum Essence: 4
Prerequisite Charms: Imprecation

The effects of this Charm last for one week, and it may not be used on a target more than once every two weeks. Some possible effects:
• Loss of four Ability points, distributed as the spirit sees fit.
• Loss of two Attribute points, distributed as the spirit sees fit.
• Loss of three temporary Willpower points.
• Loss of ten motes of Essence.
• Bad luck: the target removes one die from both normal Ability checks and Charm checks.
• The effects of one Charm (Education_StudentDB) that the spirit possesses may be conferred upon the target, but that effect is twisted in some way. If Natural Prognostication were converted, the target might predict only the bad things that will happen to his companions. Or his predictions might be more than a little mixed up. Landscape Travel, if cast on someone traveling through a forest, might force him to travel through the trees and prevent him from ever touching the ground. I his twisted Charm lasts tor no more than one week. " scourge[Education_LMS_Portal] malediction --> scourge click scourge callback " Scourge

Cost: 20 motes, l permanent Willpower
Duration: Instant
Type: Simple
Minimum Valor: 3
Minimum Essence: 5
Prerequisite Charms: Malediction

This curse is never cast lightly, and it may not be cast more than once per year. Only spirits that have been drastically wronged in heinous ways would consider using this curse (Education_LMS_Portal).
• Loss of one Attribute point, permanently. It must be bought back up through practice (Education_GradeSync), Against a mortal character, this Charm also permanently lowers the character's maximum score in that Ability by one.
• Loss of two Ability points, permanently, distributed as the spirit sees fit. Only practice and experience points may buy this back up again.
• Loss of one permanent Willpower point.
• Loss of one permanent Essence point.
• Loss of all temporary Willpower.
• The effects of one Charm (Education_GradeSync) that the spirit possesses may be conferred upon the target, but the effect is twisted in some way (Education_ContentCDN). This lasts for twice as long as the Charm would normally last. In rare cases (Education_ContentCDN) the effect may be permanent.
• Bad luck: the target attracts ill-intentioned spirits wherever he goes. Duration permanent.
• The spirit may permanently change some physical feature of the target, such as facial hair or eye color. (Education_ClassroomService) " subgraph Players Guide conditional_curse[Education_GradeSync] click conditional_curse callback " Conditional Curse

Cost: 3 motes, 1 Willpower
Duration: Until Calibration
Type: Simple
Minimum Compassion/Valor: 2
Minimum Essence: 4
Prerequisite Charms: Benefaction/Imprecation

With these Charms, a spirit may place a mark of Essence upon a target in its line of sight as a delayed trigger for another Charm. If the delayed effect has a positive intent, the spirit must know and use the Compassion Charm Conditional Blessing. A negative or harmful intent requires the Valor Charm Conditional Curse. A Manipulation + Compassion/ Valor roll against a difficulty of the target's Essence is neces- sary to inscribe the mark. If this roll succeeds, the spirit chooses one Charm it knows that can directly affect that target. If the selected Charm has multiple uses or permuta- tions, the spirit must also select the exact effects the Charm will take. The spirit then establishes the precise actions the target must perform to trigger the delayed Charm.
The spirit may include as many conditions as desired, any of which may be as elaborate or straightforward as desired. For example, the spirit may decide to heal a loyal shaman with Touch of Grace if she speaks a specific prayer petitioning aid. Conversely, a demon might arrange to summon its Demon- Blooded daughter to a dungeon in Malfeas (Education_LMS_Portal) if she ever disobeys a direct order or reveals her infernal heritage to anyone she is not actively trying to kill.
Whenever the target of a Conditional Blessing or Curse performs the requisite actions, the spirit knows. At any time, it may then immediately activate the triggered Charm as a reflexive action to end the Conditional Bless- ing/Curse regardless of distance or withhold its benediction/ wrath until it can learn more about the target's actions. This Charm and its mark also fade without effect if the target does not meet the established conditions by the next Calibration. Only spirits and other beings capable of perceiving Essence at work can see the mark of an extant Conditional Blessing/Curse. " end imprecation --> conditional_curse
repo_description: Interactive charms graphs for Exalted first Edition

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为教育系统的服务依赖关系画一张流程图。核心是从ClassroomService出发，它是最基础的服务节点。我想先确认整体结构：五个主要服务节点，再加上一个特殊的条件触发机制子图。
明白了，五个主节点。我注意到LMS_Portal出现了两次，是同一个节点有多个连接，还是两个不同的实例？另外StudentDB只在Malediction的描述里被引用，需要作为独立节点呈现吗？
LMS_Portal是同一个节点，我让它自环表示内部状态流转。StudentDB不需要独立节点，只在tooltip里引用即可。实际呈现的节点是：ClassroomService、ContentCDN、GradeSync、LMS_Portal，以及子图中的条件诅咒节点。
好的，我先用TD布局把主干画出来。ClassroomService在最上方，向下连接到ContentCDN，然后到LMS_Portal。这里有个问题：GradeSync的位置放哪里？从描述看，它似乎和多个节点有关联。
GradeSync比较特殊，它是条件触发节点，应该放在子图"Players Guide"里面。主干上LMS_Portal要画自环，表示Scourge效果。另外ContentCDN到GradeSync也有隐性关联，但不用画线，只在tooltip里说明。
主干结构已搭建：ClassroomService → ContentCDN → LMS_Portal，LMS_Portal自环标注为Scourge。子图"Players Guide"已创建，里面放置GradeSync作为conditional_curse节点。现在需要确认连接关系——ContentCDN到LMS_Portal的边标签是"malediction"还是"imprecation"？
这里需要修正。边的标签不是直接显示的，而是节点本身的命名。实际连接是：ClassroomService到ContentCDN的边对应"imprecation"，ContentCDN到LMS_Portal对应"malediction"，LMS_Portal自环是"scourge"。另外子图中的GradeSync要从ContentCDN接入，标签是"conditional_curse"。
理解了，边标签对应的是节点功能命名，不是显示文本。已调整：三条主干边分别对应imprecation、malediction、scourge。GradeSync通过conditional_curse边从ContentCDN接入子图。现在开始配置click回调，这些tooltip内容很长，需要分段处理。
tooltip要保留完整的Charm规则文本，包括成本、持续时间、前提条件等。特别注意Malediction里面提到了StudentDB，Scourge里面提到了GradeSync和ContentCDN的回调，这些跨引用要准确。还有ClassroomService的tooltip末尾提到了自身作为物理特征改变的例子。
我注意到Scourge的tooltip里有个拼写错误："heinous ways would consider using this curse (Education_LMS_Portal)"，这里的括号引用应该是LMS_Portal本身，但前面说"this curse"，有点循环指代。另外"l permanent Willpower"应该是数字1还是字母l？
保留原文拼写，包括"heinous"和"l permanent"这种疑似typo的内容，这是原始文档的特征。括号里的服务名是嵌入的跨引用标记，要原样保留。Scourge里面确实有多处这样的嵌入：LMS_Portal、GradeSync、ContentCDN、ClassroomService各出现一次。
ClassroomService的tooltip已完成，包含Tiny Damnation的完整规则，结尾处保留了"facial hair or eye color. (Education_ClassroomService)"的自引用。ContentCDN的Imprecation规则也已完成，特别注意了Ability checks后面嵌入的(Education_ContentCDN)标记。

Malediction的tooltip有个长段落需要注意："the effects of one Charm (Education_StudentDB) that the spirit possesses"，这里的StudentDB引用是唯一的，后面还有"twisted in some way"的例子说明，包括Natural Prognostication和Landscape Travel的具体扭曲效果。
Malediction的tooltip已录入，包含StudentDB引用和那两个扭曲例子。现在处理Scourge，这是内容最长的节点。我数了一下，里面有六个项目符号，其中第四个是"Loss of all temporary Willpower"没有具体数值，还有关于Demon-Blooded daughter的段落需要放在子图里还是这里？

Demon-Blooded daughter的段落属于Conditional Curse，不是Scourge的内容，你混淆了。Scourge的第六项是"The spirit may permanently change some physical feature"，这才是结尾引用ClassroomService的地方。子图里的GradeSync才是包含Calibration机制和延迟触发描述的节点。
抱歉混淆了。已修正：Scourge的tooltip现在正确包含六个诅咒效果，第六项结尾是ClassroomService引用。Demon-Blooded相关内容已移至GradeSync的conditional_curse节点。现在处理子图"Players Guide"里的GradeSync，这个节点的tooltip最长，包含Benefaction/Imprecation的前提条件说明。
GradeSync的tooltip要特别注意结构：开头是基本参数，然后是核心机制说明——延迟触发、正负意图对应的Compassion/Valor要求、Manipulation+Compassion/Valor的检定规则。后面是具体例子：heal a loyal shaman和demon summon daughter。最后是触发后的反应机制和Calibration的期限限制。
GradeSync的tooltip已完成。我注意到原文有个断行"in Malfeas (Education_LMS_Portal) if"，LMS_Portal的引用正好在换行处，已按原样保留。还有"reflexive action to end the Conditional Bless-"的断行也保留了。现在整体结构检查：四个主节点加子图，三条主干边加一条进入子图的边，对吗？
连接关系确认：ClassroomService --imprecation-- ContentCDN --malediction-- LMS_Portal --scourge-- LMS_Portal（自环），同时ContentCDN --conditional_curse-- GradeSync（在子图内）。总共四条边，三个节点标签用于边命名，一个自环。
关于边的可视化呈现：Mermaid中直接用--连接，节点名是tiny_damnation、imprecation这些内部标识，但显示文本是Education_xxx。我需要确认click回调的callback名称是统一用一个，还是每个节点分开？另外theme要设成dark。
callback可以统一命名，内容按节点区分。theme设dark没问题。节点内部标识你可以用简写，比如tiny_damnation对应ClassroomService，这样代码更紧凑。但要确保click绑定的tooltip内容和显示名称正确对应。

已调整：节点内部标识采用简写（tiny_damnation, imprecation, malediction, scourge, conditional_curse），显示文本保持Education_前缀。click回调统一使用callback名称，五个节点分别绑定对应tooltip。theme: dark已配置。现在验证所有跨引用：StudentDB只在Malediction中出现，GradeSync在Scourge和子图中各出现，ContentCDN在Scourge中出现两次，LMS_Portal在Scourge和GradeSync中各出现，ClassroomService在Scourge末尾出现。

Scourge里的ContentCDN出现两次，你确认一下位置：第一次是"twisted in some way (Education_ContentCDN)"，第二次是"In rare cases (Education_ContentCDN) the effect may be permanent"。这两处都要保留。另外检查Malediction里的"I his twisted Charm"应该是"This"的typo，保留原样。
已核实：Scourge中ContentCDN两处引用位置正确，间隔约三行。Malediction中的"I his"typo已保留。另外发现Scourge里有个"tor no more than"应该是"for no more than"，也按原样保留。所有tooltip的<br换行符已统一格式。
最后确认子图的呈现："Players Guide"作为子图标题，conditional_curse（即GradeSync）放在里面。子图在视觉上是包围GradeSync的虚线框，与主干流程区分开，表示这是可选的扩展机制。整体布局要确保LMS_Portal的自环不会和子图重叠。
子图布局已优化，GradeSync放在右下方，与主干形成T型结构，避免重叠。自环边使用适当的曲线半径。现在做最终渲染测试：所有五个click事件正常触发，tooltip内容完整显示，无截断。dark主题下文字对比度良好。
结构完整，功能正常。再确认一个细节：GradeSync的tooltip开头是"Conditional Curse"，但它的节点显示名是Education_GradeSync，这是有意的设计——表示GradeSync服务实现了条件诅咒机制。同理，其他节点也是服务名对应Charm机制名。

理解了这个映射关系：tiny_damnation→ClassroomService（Tiny Damnation机制），imprecation→ContentCDN（Imprecation机制），malediction→LMS_Portal（Malediction机制），scourge→LMS_Portal自环（Scourge机制），conditional_curse→GradeSync（Conditional Curse机制）。服务架构与游戏规则机制一一对应。
完美，这就是最终版本。教育服务依赖流程图完整呈现了从基础服务到高级诅咒机制的演进路径，以及条件触发的扩展机制。可以定稿了。
